title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a trigger evaluation dataset after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for agent ext triggers that tests this competency: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Trigger Evals trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.

content.text: For Trigger Evals, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Trigger Evals precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case for agent ext triggers that tests this competency: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A skill that works after manual selection needs no trigger tests.

stimulus.title: Trigger Evals case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for agent ext triggers that tests this competency: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A skill that works after manual selection needs no trigger tests.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure missed triggers, false triggers, and competing-skill selection. Artifact under review: a trigger evaluation dataset.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Trigger Evals, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Trigger Evals record says a trigger evaluation dataset looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Trigger Evals without its stated preconditions, omit the a trigger evaluation dataset trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Trigger Evals for a trigger evaluation dataset.
